problem id: 6dbd9643
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND SHL(6)) XOR ROT(6)

examples:
  01001101 -> 00010011
  01001110 -> 10010011
  10010101 -> 01100101
  11011111 -> 00110111
  11111110 -> 00111111
  10001111 -> 10100011
  00100100 -> 00001001
  01111111 -> 00011111
  11001111 -> 10110011
  11110110 -> 00111101

query: 00101110
predicted answer: 10001011
